LITTER_SELF_CLEANING.siloViability: LOW — Only 2 products. Cannot sustain a full hub page or comparison matrix. Recommend: expand inventory before building dedicated silo. Use existing 'self-cleaning-litter-box-guide' collection as supporting content under broader Litter category.

topSKUs.name: 60L Automatic Cat Litter Box, Smart App Control, Deodorizing, Infrared Sensor, Suitable For Multiple Cats

LITTER_STANDARD.siloViability: MEDIUM — Sufficient for hub page. Includes litter box enclosures, furniture-style, and standard boxes. Strong collection coverage already exists (6+ active collections).

CAT_TREES.siloViability: HIGH — 64 products with strong price range and diversity. 20+ existing collections cover sub-intents (large cats, modern, Maine Coon, small apartments, multi-cat). This is the strongest silo candidate.
comparisonTableCandidates: Flower Cat Tree ($604.99) vs Multi-Level Pear Wood ($226.99) vs Corner Modern ($218.99)
Large Cats: Heavy Duty towers vs Maine Coon specific vs Overweight cat trees
Budget: Under $100 compact trees vs $100-200 mid-range vs $200+ luxury

CAT_WALL_SYSTEMS.siloViability: VERY LOW — Only 3 products. Cannot differentiate as a standalone pillar. Recommend: fold into Cat Furniture misc or a 'Space-Saving Cat Solutions' angle under Cat Trees silo.

CAT_FURNITURE_MISC.siloViability: MEDIUM — Includes catios, cat houses, scratchers, beds, tunnels. Good supporting category but too diverse for a single focused silo.

OTHER.note: Includes dog products, small animal cages, bird cages, chicken coops, fish tanks, general accessories. This represents 74% of active inventory and should NOT be deleted but can be de-prioritized in navigation and internal linking.
